generated_oml:
instance StaticFrictionParameterInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identification of static friction parameters for joint motion control"
]

instance KineticFrictionParameterInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identification of kinetic friction parameters for joint motion control"
]

instance ViscousFrictionParameterInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identification of viscous friction parameters for joint motion control"
]

instance MotionAccuracyEnhancementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Enhanced motion accuracy through friction model refinement"
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization dashboard for friction analysis",
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionAccuracyEnhancementInsight, StaticFrictionParameterInsight, KineticFrictionParameterInsight, ViscousFrictionParameterInsight
]

instance FrictionModelIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of white-box and black-box friction models to improve motion accuracy",
    DTDFVocab:provides StaticFrictionParameterInsight, KineticFrictionParameterInsight, ViscousFrictionParameterInsight
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML modeling tool for structural representation",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationDashboardService, FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance MATLABSimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink for friction simulation models",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance MQTTProtocolEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data streaming",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationDashboardService, FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShellEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for asset management and interoperability",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationDashboardService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationToolsEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tools for real-time monitoring",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationDashboardService
]

instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor position encoder for MABI MAX 100 first axis",
    DTDFVocab:producedData PositionData
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder behind gearbox for MABI MAX 100 first axis",
    DTDFVocab:producedData PositionData
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor for motor drive of MABI MAX 100 first axis",
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentData
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor for MABI MAX 100 first axis"
]

instance GearTransmission : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gear transmission component in MABI MAX 100 first axis"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox in MABI MAX 100 first axis"
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIK840DslCNCController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for axis control in MABI MAX 100 first axis"
]

instance PositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder
]

instance VelocityData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder
]

instance CurrentData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance MeasuredInputCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured input current data from physical sensors",
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentData,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance MeasuredTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured torque data derived from current and position sensors",
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentData, PositionData,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance MeasuredAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured angular velocity data from position sensors",
    DTDFVocab:fromData VelocityData,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulatedOutputsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated friction model outputs",
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentData,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardVisualizationToolsEnabler
]

instance BlockDefinitionDiagram : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for MABI MAX 100 first axis structural model",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance InternalBlockDiagram : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for MABI MAX 100 first axis structural model",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb-Viscous friction simulation model for robot joint",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction simulation model for robot joint",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction simulation model for robot joint",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction simulation model for robot joint",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for MABI MAX 100 robot first axis",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AssetAdministrationShellEnabler
]

instance RobotAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, GearTransmission, CycloidalGearbox, SiemensSINUMERIK840DslCNCController, MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, CurrentSensor
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data streaming via MQTT; specific update rates not specified in document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Digital shadow integrating SysML structural models, Simulink behavioral models, real-time sensor data via MQTT, and visualization dashboard for friction analysis and motion control improvement."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated phase; continuous monitoring during robot operation for wear and application changes."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through comparison of simulated data against measured reference values; specific verification metrics and uncertainty quantification not detailed."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data transmission from physical sensors to digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) and SysML modeling standards."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety cell restricts working range to [-90°, 90°], but no DT-specific cybersecurity or safety protocols detailed."
]
